I help agrifood and agritech brands reach a senior, global audience that actually shapes adoption — founders, agronomists, educators, and policymakers — through content built on credibility, not hype.

Why Brands Work With Me

Credibility That Travels

As a recognised AI in agriculture influencer and LinkedIn Top Voice — with a PhD and a working agritech company behind the commentary — I bring something most creator audiences don't have: decision-makers who trust the source.

My community isn't passive reach. It's agrifood leaders, technical specialists, and institutional buyers who follow for substance. That makes partnerships here a route to genuine influence on how technology gets evaluated and adopted across the sector — not just impressions.

Ways to Collaborate
01

Sponsored Content & Newsletter Features

Considered, disclosed placements across LinkedIn and the AI in Agriculture newsletter — written to inform my audience, so the association strengthens your brand rather than straining trust.

02

Webinars & Live Workshops

Co-hosted sessions and product-grounded workshops that demonstrate real capability to a qualified agritech audience — ideal for launches and category education.

03

Keynotes & Event Appearances

Brand-aligned stage presence at conferences and summits. See the speaking page for signature topics and formats.

04

Strategic Advisory Partnerships

Longer-term relationships where I advise on responsible AI positioning and go-to-market. Detailed on the advisory page.

05

Educational Collaborations

Course modules, explainers, and YouTube content that pair your technology with credible, accessible teaching for 3,000+ students and a 18K+ subscriber base.
